text: The crazy party is most people think they're giving you a compliment when they say you're skinny,but a lot of people actually find being called skinny to be a subtle dig,most of my friends are like you're so small , you're a twig , my little stick girl . It actually can really hurt. Especially people like me. I was happy with my body and eating until a girl said How do you look like that when you eat so much? she meant it as a compliment, but I started to look in the mirror and feel fat, I started to eat less, and less, until I stopped eating at all. I was and still am really vulnerable to sickness because of me not wanting to eat. The only reason I eat at all is my boyfriend making me, not in a toxic I Don't want you to be better way, but in a I can't lose you way.

text: I was chubby back then, i was said to stop eating by kids in class. I had no friends, i wore baggy clothes, and i was insecure. Im skinny now, ive been told to eat, gain weight, and workout. Im told i am weak. No matter how you look, someone has envy. Someone, anyone will find a way to ruin someones confidence. Stay strong, if you go through this, know we are all imperfect in a beautiful way. Much love to everyone. Just know we are living things, we laugh, and we cry. We all have sensitive topics no one cares about. Be yourself!!! Bless those who read it till the end. Learn to love yourself. - anonymous person
video_title: #fashion #ootd #outfitideas #outfit #style #aesthetic #dresses

text: guys, i see some comments saying i want to be skinny or whatever but people need to understand that it s deeper than that. like for instance, im on the chubbier side of the scale and i wish i was a bit skinner, and some of these people feel the same way. they wish they were a little thicker. i m not trying to say that this is what the person was trying to say but from what i experience on a day to day bases, that s what most people think. i know some people might think this is common sense but i just wanted to get this out there just in case someone didn t know. people also need to understand how much words can hurt, just like saying someone is or was skinny. i know it doesn t seem like much, but it can really take a toll on people. and it can stick with them the rest of their life, so be careful what you say to someone. it can effect what they do with their life and how they want to end it. i m not targeting anyone btw, don t get mad at me
video_title: #fashion #ootd #outfitideas #outfit #style #aesthetic #dresses

text: body shaming goes both ways. yes, chubbier people get it worse but skinny people also have to deal with it. why do you want to gain weight? do you know how many people would kill for your body, be grateful. do you know how easy it would be to kidnap you? your so light. whats wrong? i just wanted to see if i could pick you up c mon, eat more, you probably barely even do. why are you eating junk food? that body won t last forever, just wait until you re an adult. oh i ll just order you a salad, your probably on a diet. edit hi! i just want to clarify some things i said, I don t think fat shaming is worse, i think they re both equal. i m sorry if it came out wrong, i should ve clarified it. i think the media has that opinion. because if you skinny shame people your just jealous and if you fat shame someone your the goat or just plain rude. it s honestly so dumb how people toss aside others insecurities by just saying you should be grateful. and if you have an ED i hope you feel better and get the help you need

text: Being skinny doesn t mean you don t eat. Being curvy doesn t mean you re fat. Being flat isn t ugly. Getting body shamed doesn t mean what they say is true. You are beautiful the way you are! Just because people say things about your body n stuff doesn t always mean it s true. You don t have to change anything about you. Be you! Edit I don t wanna be that person but thank you guys for the likes!!!! I never knew this could blow up in like a week Edit 2 you guys don t have to change anything about you for people to like you. If they don t like you, that s their problem! You need to stop listening to all those un positive people. They really just want a reaction and they expect it. Don t give them the attention they want. Please be yourself and you don t need to change anything about you. Edit 3 this is the most likes I ve ever gotten and I m so happy. And I m so happy that you guys are reading this, you guys should be happy that you are here on this beautiful earth. God bless you. Edit 4 since I have over 300 likes, I m going to be writing about your color of outfits. Red red is a beautiful color to wear. Just because people assume that you re a pick me, doesn t always mean that you are one. Red is beautiful don t let anyone else tell that it s not. Orange Colorful, bright, lovely. I love orange! Some people don t and they might just hate you for wearing that. That shouldn t mean anything you should just block those negative people in life Yellow I love yellow. It reminds me of a banana color! Light yellow is one of my favorite colors. I don t see why anyone would hate it! Green green is a sometimes dark, or bright color. And I love that it reminds me of a sweet, juicy, green apple! I love green apples, but if you re allergic, you hate them lol. and that okay ofc cuz you can t eat them cuz you re allergic. Blue I love blue. It reminds me of the beautiful blue sky. also if it s light sky blue. If you re a girl who likes blue and you think it s a boy color, lemme just remind you, back very long ago, blue was for girls! Boys can like blue too. I love it, and you might too. Your never alone Purple purple is my second favorite color. It s just so calming for me. If I need to relax somewhere, and if I could, I would sit in a purple soft chair, and in a purple room. Gray gray is also very cool I love it cuz it reminds me of the smoggy air on a very cold day. It just relaxes me somehow. I love winter and the fog Black just because you, or someone else wears black, doesn t mean they re depressed, or emo maybe because it s easy, and doesn t stain easily. Oorrrr if a woman were to wear black pants don t judge that woman if you know what she s going through. Black is a very nice color and goes with everything! Pink pink is also not a pick me color. Pink reminds me of bubble gum. I love bubble gum! If you hate it, that okay! Some people hate a lot of things others love. You don t have to like things you 𝗗𝗼𝗻 𝘁 like. White white is a plain color and I like that! I wouldn t rly wear it though cuz you can t trust me with white shirts or pants lol. text: Capsule wardrobes are great and ideally the goal, however I find the hardest part of achieving a quality capsule it fit. text: In case of an emergency it is possible to climb over the seats while the gangway is reseverd for the less mobile passengers. And have practical slippers.

text: If you are flying first thing in the morning don't put on accessories that need to be removed at Security. You can put on a non--critical belt or jewelry after TSA. Know where in your carry-on is a convenient pocket for the contents of your pockets and put your stuff there after ID check if you are waiting in line. Your stuff will always be safer--and far more convenient, than in a bin or bowl.

text: If you travel alone especially if you are female . Dress casual but elegant, have decent make-up. That and having nice bags might get you an upgrade into business class. same for hotels btw. If they overbooked and staff has orders to upgrade - they want the lucky guy or gall to look the part. That means the other passengers will not feel bad for having paid full, based on your polished look they will assume you paid full as well . Staff assumes if you look classy then you will also behave in a classy manner. I once read that staff likes to upgrade females, single travellers. Single because often it is only one seat and females - eye candy - or they expect females to be more pleasant passenger ?? I mean they could also go by miles and give a passenger the upgrade when they do not yet have the necessary miles.

text: This is what you should wear every time you fly. First hard soled shoes. Secondly all cotton clothing including undergarments. Why? The hard soled shoes will help you get out of the plane if you do survive the crash. There is going to be a lot of metal to go through. Wear all cotton. Your more likely to die from burns as most of our clothing nowadays has some sort of plastic in it. The intense heat from the fire will be high enough to melt your clothes into your flesh. Cotton gives you a much better chance. You can style it any way you want. Happy safe flying to all.
